descs.desc:
Clash Power +1 for every 2 ([Laceration] + [Combustion]) on the main target (max 6)
Deal more damage based on missing HP on self (max 10%)
Deal -50% damage against sub-targets
[TargetKill] All allies gain 2 [ThatIsRhythm] next turn (once per Skill)
[EndSkill] Heal 8 SP for (1 + highest Reson.) other allies with the least SP (max 4 units)
[EndSkill] For 2 turns, lose 8 SP at Combat End
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttackHead] At 10%+ HP, take 4 ~ 8 HP damage (once per Coin)
- Then, Reuse this Coin (4 times per Skill)
- This damage does not Stagger or reduce this unit's HP below 1
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Combustion]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Laceration]
[OnSucceedAttack] A random ally gains 1 [ThatIsRhythm] next turn (once per Coin)

descs.desc:
[CantIdentify]
Targets randomly
Clash Power +1 for every 2 ([Laceration] + [Combustion]) on the main target (max 6)
Deal more damage based on missing HP on self (max 10%)
Deal -50% damage against sub-targets
[BeforeAttack] Gain Atk Weight equal to (highest Reson. / 2) (max 2; rounded down)
[BeforeAttack] Base Power -2 for every Cracked Coin (max -6)
[EndSkill] Heal 10 SP for 4 other allies with the least SP
[EndSkill] All allies gain 2 [ThatIsRhythm], 1 [CrimsonDamageUp], 1 [ScarletDamageUp], 1 [VioletDamageUp], 1 [Vulnerable] next turn
- If target was killed, activate the effect above once more
coinDescs:
[SuperCoin]
[OnSucceedAttack] At 10%+ HP, take 10 ~ 20 HP damage (once per Coin)
- Then, Reuse this Coin if the sum of HP lost due to this effect is less than 50 (4 times per Skill)
- This damage does not Stagger or reduce this unit's HP below 1
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Combustion]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Laceration]
[OnSucceedAttack] A random ally gains 1 [ThatIsRhythm] next turn (once per Coin)

2100911.name: That... was Indeed a Rhythm
2100911.desc:
Turn Start: Gain 2 [ThatIsRhythm]

On Target Kill: This unit heals 5% HP and 5 SP (once per turn)
- If target was killed by E.G.O Skill - Harmony, double the amount this effect heals

Turn End: If this unit lost SP this turn, heal (4 + sum of [Combustion] and [Laceration] on all enemies / 10) SP (max 10; rounded down)
